actionable_feedback: {'issue': 'Evidence traceability (ri_1) is incomplete.', 'fix': "Add a dedicated Evidence_Log tab with unique row IDs (e.g., E-001...), and in the memo cite those IDs inline after each claim (e.g., '[Evidence_Log E-023]'). Include fields: source doc, page/section, data point, value, units, spec/limit, date/time, instrument/system, reviewer initials.", 'acceptance_criteria': 'Every quantitative or rules-relevant claim in the memo has at least one bracketed Evidence_Log reference; Evidence_Log rows include units and limits; spot-check of 10 memo claims maps to valid Evidence_Log rows.'}

{'issue': 'Workbook structure deviates from required tabs; classification logic is opaque (ri_8, ri_3).', 'fix': 'Create or rename tabs to match: Cover, Evidence_Log, Risk_Scoring, Classification, Root_Cause_Tree, CAPA_Tracker, Missing_Evidence. Implement a visible decision-tree/criteria table in Classification with rule_id, condition, evidence_ref(s), and pass/fail outcome.', 'acceptance_criteria': "Workbook contains the required tabs with content; Classification tab renders final 'Critical' from rule evaluation with evidence refs."}

{'issue': 'RCA is not fully structured or evidence-linked (ri_5).', 'fix': 'Build a Root_Cause_Tree spanning Equipment/Methods/Materials/Environment/People with node IDs; link each node to Evidence_Log row IDs; rank likelihood; list confirmatory tests and required additional evidence.', 'acceptance_criteria': 'Root_Cause_Tree shows at least two branches beyond the initiating equipment alarm; each node lists linked evidence refs and verification steps; likelihood scoring is present.'}

{'issue': 'CAPA plan lacks owners/dates/effectiveness metrics (ri_6).', 'fix': 'Add a CAPA_Tracker tab with fields: action_id, type (containment/correction/corrective/preventive), linked_cause_id, description, owner, due date, status, effectiveness metric, measurement plan, baseline/target, verification window. Mirror key CAPAs in the memo.', 'acceptance_criteria': 'Each corrective/preventive action has an owner, due date, metric with baseline and target, and a scheduled effectiveness check; at least one action links to the repeat stopper-bowl vibration trend.'}

{'issue': 'Missing Evidence/Decision Conditions list is sparse (ri_7).', 'fix': 'Populate a Missing_Evidence tab with: item_id, description, why_needed, impact_on_disposition, interim_controls, request_status, owner, due_date; mirror disposition gating conditions in the memo.', 'acceptance_criteria': 'Each missing item states its disposition impact and interim control; memo includes an explicit checklist of conditions to move from Hold to Restricted Release or to Reject.'}

{'issue': 'Risk model transparency can be improved (ri_2).', 'fix': 'In Risk_Scoring, show input cells (each linked to Evidence_Log rows), visible formulas for each term, and a sensitivity check toggling each term to zero to verify signs/multipliers.', 'acceptance_criteria': 'Workbook-calculated risk equals 60 with current inputs; sensitivity rows recalculate as expected; input cells list evidence refs.'}

{'issue': 'Regulatory citation depth and unit/spec alignment (ri_9, ri_10).', 'fix': 'Add textual references to ICH Q9(R1) risk management, FDA Process Validation (2011) on continued process verification, and PIC/S/EU GMP Annex 1 aseptic expectations; ensure identical units/specs across memo and workbook.', 'acceptance_criteria': 'Memo references include section names; random check of 5 data points finds units/specs consistent between memo and workbook.'}
artifact_specific_comments: {'artifact': 'attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'comment': 'Good GMP tone and rationale. Add inline Evidence_Log citations for each claim; add explicit disposition gating checklist; include CAPA owner/due dates/effectiveness metrics; add references to ICH Q9(R1), FDA PV 2011, and PIC/S/EU Annex 1 by name/section.'}

{'artifact': 'attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'comment': 'Reconstitute the required tab set; implement visible formulas and rule mapping; link all decision inputs to Evidence_Log rows; add CAPA_Tracker and Missing_Evidence with owners/dates/metrics and status.'}
feedback_summary: Strong formula fidelity (risk score 60) and correct Critical classification with a defensible Hold disposition. However, evidence traceability is weak (no explicit Evidence_Log row IDs cited in the memo), RCA is under-structured and not fully evidence-linked, CAPA ownership/dates/effectiveness metrics are missing, the Missing_Evidence/Decision_Conditions are incomplete, and the workbook structure deviates from the required tab set (consolidated sheets, no explicit Classification decision tree). Align units/limits across memo and workbook, add explicit regulatory references beyond 21 CFR 211, and define clear, measurable gating conditions for any future restricted release.

extra_model_fields.grounding_summary: Key facts (risk 60, Critical, Hold; evidence points) are supported by the memo preview; workbook sheet names align with trace.
noted_inconsistencies: ri_1 and ri_6 appear in both failed_criteria and passed_criteria in grader metadata.
Top-level score_source shows deterministic_artifact_contract while rubric details are model_judged.
Duplicate rubric_item_scores blocks (deterministic vs model) without normalization.

limitations_observed: XLSX preview unavailable (openpyxl missing); workbook structure inferred from trace and filenames.
Memo preview truncated; CAPA ownership/dates and full Missing_Evidence list not fully visible.
metadata_json.public_response_summary: Model evaluator generated actionable feedback and revision plan.

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Every quantitative or rules-relevant claim in the memo has at least one bracketed Evidence_Log reference; Evidence_Log rows include units and limits; spot-check of 10 memo claims maps to valid Evidence_Log rows.
actionable_feedback.fix: Add a dedicated Evidence_Log tab with unique row IDs (e.g., E-001...), and in the memo cite those IDs inline after each claim (e.g., '[Evidence_Log E-023]'). Include fields: source doc, page/section, data point, value, units, spec/limit, date/time, instrument/system, reviewer initials.

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Workbook contains the required tabs with content; Classification tab renders final 'Critical' from rule evaluation with evidence refs.
actionable_feedback.fix: Create or rename tabs to match: Cover, Evidence_Log, Risk_Scoring, Classification, Root_Cause_Tree, CAPA_Tracker, Missing_Evidence. Implement a visible decision-tree/criteria table in Classification with rule_id, condition, evidence_ref(s), and pass/fail outcome.
actionable_feedback.issue: Workbook structure deviates from required tabs; classification logic is opaque (ri_8, ri_3).

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Root_Cause_Tree shows at least two branches beyond the initiating equipment alarm; each node lists linked evidence refs and verification steps; likelihood scoring is present.
actionable_feedback.fix: Build a Root_Cause_Tree spanning Equipment/Methods/Materials/Environment/People with node IDs; link each node to Evidence_Log row IDs; rank likelihood; list confirmatory tests and required additional evidence.
actionable_feedback.issue: RCA is not fully structured or evidence-linked (ri_5).

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Each corrective/preventive action has an owner, due date, metric with baseline and target, and a scheduled effectiveness check; at least one action links to the repeat stopper-bowl vibration trend.
actionable_feedback.fix: Add a CAPA_Tracker tab with fields: action_id, type (containment/correction/corrective/preventive), linked_cause_id, description, owner, due date, status, effectiveness metric, measurement plan, baseline/target, verification window. Mirror key CAPAs in the memo.

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Each missing item states its disposition impact and interim control; memo includes an explicit checklist of conditions to move from Hold to Restricted Release or to Reject.
actionable_feedback.fix: Populate a Missing_Evidence tab with: item_id, description, why_needed, impact_on_disposition, interim_controls, request_status, owner, due_date; mirror disposition gating conditions in the memo.
actionable_feedback.issue: Missing Evidence/Decision Conditions list is sparse (ri_7).

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Workbook-calculated risk equals 60 with current inputs; sensitivity rows recalculate as expected; input cells list evidence refs.
actionable_feedback.fix: In Risk_Scoring, show input cells (each linked to Evidence_Log rows), visible formulas for each term, and a sensitivity check toggling each term to zero to verify signs/multipliers.
actionable_feedback.issue: Risk model transparency can be improved (ri_2).

actionable_feedback.acceptance_criteria: Memo references include section names; random check of 5 data points finds units/specs consistent between memo and workbook.
actionable_feedback.fix: Add textual references to ICH Q9(R1) risk management, FDA Process Validation (2011) on continued process verification, and PIC/S/EU GMP Annex 1 aseptic expectations; ensure identical units/specs across memo and workbook.
actionable_feedback.issue: Regulatory citation depth and unit/spec alignment (ri_9, ri_10).

artifact_specific_comments.comment: Good GMP tone and rationale. Add inline Evidence_Log citations for each claim; add explicit disposition gating checklist; include CAPA owner/due dates/effectiveness metrics; add references to ICH Q9(R1), FDA PV 2011, and PIC/S/EU Annex 1 by name/section.

Reconstitute the required tab set; implement visible formulas and rule mapping; link all decision inputs to Evidence_Log rows; add CAPA_Tracker and Missing_Evidence with owners/dates/metrics and status.

raw_llm_output.suggested_revision: Add the missing workbook tabs; implement Evidence_Log with unique row IDs and cite them in the memo; separate and expand Root_Cause_Tree; create a CAPA_Tracker with owners/dates/effectiveness metrics; fully populate Missing_Evidence and mirror disposition gating conditions in the memo; implement a visible Risk_Scoring formula area and a rule-based Classification decision tree; normalize units/specs across artifacts and add ICH Q9(R1)/FDA PV/PIC-S Annex 1 references.
trace_specific_comments: build_outputs.py generated the workbook via direct OOXML; ensure the revised generator writes the additional tabs, visible formulas, and ID cross-links.
Include a lightweight self-check in the generator to compute and write the risk score and classification both as values and as formula-driven cells to avoid preview limitations.
